title: GitHub Release Manager Configuration
description: Configuration schema for managing GitHub release-based software installations

softwares.description: List of software packages to manage

id.description: Unique identifier for the software package

url.description: Download URL template with @version@ placeholder and optional variable substitutions (${kernel}, ${MACHINE}, ${arch}, ${ARCH}, ${KERNEL})

version.description: Version to install (use 'latest' for the most recent release)

versionArg.description: Command or argument to check the installed version of the software

sudo.description: Whether to use sudo for installation

targetFile.description: Target installation path for the software

installCallback.description: Custom installation callback function (e.g., InstallCallbacks::installFromTarGz, InstallCallbacks::installDeb)

softVersionCallback.description: Custom callback function to extract version information

id.description: Unique identifier for the software package

type.description: Indicates this software should be installed via git clone

sudo.description: Whether to use sudo for installation

targetDir.description: Target directory where the repository will be cloned

installScript.description: Post-clone script to execute for installation setup

targetFile.description: Primary target file path (for verification purposes)
